summary: CashBook component refactoring verified - All 11 features tested and working correctly. The 902-line CashBook.jsx was successfully split into 5 sub-components: SummaryCards, CashBookFilters, TransactionsTable, PartySummaryTab, TransactionFormDialog. All functionality remains identical after refactoring.
critical_code_review_comments: Code quality is good - refactoring maintains separation of concerns
All data-testid attributes preserved for testing
Props are properly passed between components
State management remains in parent CashBook.jsx component as expected
context_for_next_testing_agent: CashBook refactoring test complete. All 5 sub-components (SummaryCards.jsx, CashBookFilters.jsx, TransactionsTable.jsx, PartySummaryTab.jsx, TransactionFormDialog.jsx) are working correctly. Navigation: Login > Cash Book / Ledgers tab.

feature_1_summary_cards.description: Summary cards show Opening Balance, Cash in Hand, Bank Balance, Total Balance with correct data

feature_2_cash_transactions_default.description: Cash Transactions tab is the default active tab, shows only cash account transactions

feature_3_party_ledgers_tab.description: Party Ledgers tab shows all transactions with Account, Party Type, Select Party filters visible

feature_4_party_summary_tab.description: Party Summary tab shows party summary cards (Total Parties, Settled, Pending, Outstanding), filters (Party Type, Status), Excel/PDF export buttons, and party table

feature_5_new_transaction_dialog.description: New Transaction button opens form dialog with all fields: date, account, type, amount, category, description, reference

feature_6_party_suggestions.description: Transaction form category field shows party suggestions dropdown when typing

feature_7_filters.description: Type, From, To date filters work correctly on Cash Transactions tab

feature_8_transactions_table.description: Transaction table shows running balance, Jama, Nikasi columns with totals row

feature_9_tab_switching.description: Tab switching between Cash Transactions, Party Ledgers, Party Summary works correctly

feature_10_export_buttons.description: Excel and PDF export buttons present on main view and Party Summary tab

feature_11_refresh_button.description: Refresh button works on each tab
